home.subtitle: Authorized material for agencies and sales advisors.
home.noResults: No experiences found with that name.

items.title: Transportation
items.desc: All our activities include roundtrip transportation.

items.title: Availability
items.desc: Our park activities are available the 365 days of the year.

items.title: Schedule
items.desc: All our park tours have 2 schedules. In the morning and in the afternoon.
items.badge: Except Super Combo & Puerto Morelos Experience

items.title: Family Friendly
items.desc: All activities can be done by +4 age children.

items.q: What type of footwear do I need for ATVs?
items.a: The activities in the park are very intense, so it is best to bring comfortable clothes and shoes, as well as a swimsuit.
Yes, each passenger must bring their towel and swimsuit, as well as their personal hygiene items.

items.q: What is the minimum age to carry out the activities in the park?
items.a: All the activities in the park can be carried out by children from 4 years old.

items.q: What is the minimum age to drive the ATV?
items.a: The minimum age is 16 years accompanied by an adult. To drive alone, it is necessary to be 18 years of age.

items.q: What is the maximum weight for horseback riding?
items.a: It is necessary that the weight of the passenger does not reach 110 kilos or 242.5 pounds.

items.q: What is the maximum weight to use the zip lines?
items.a: It is necessary that the passenger does not weigh 130 kilos or 286 pounds.

items.q: Who can not carry out the activities of the park?
items.a: Pregnant women, people with recent surgeries, muscle injuries, or physical disabilities that prevent carrying out the activities.
The use of cameras and cell phones are not permitted during our adventure activities.

items.q: Wich days does the park close?
items.a: The park only stops its operations and remains closed on January 1 and December 25.

items.q: Does the park close when it rains?
items.a: Our park remains open in regular weather conditions like torrential rain. It may stop in thunderstorms and hurricanes.
Yes, all our activities and tours include roundtrip transportation.

items.q: Where will the transportation pick me up?
items.a: Our units regularly pick up and return passengers to the hotel they are staying at. There may be exceptions.

items.q: What type of transportation will pick me up?
items.a: Our units are unmistakable thanks to their labeling and jaguar skin colors.

items.q: How can I identify the transportation driver?
items.a: You can contact customer service and request the name of the operator.

items.q: What happens if I miss transportation?
items.a: You will have to get to the park by your own means.

items.q: What drinks are included inside the park?
items.a: We have natural water dispensers, however, it does not include flavored or bottled drinks.

bestDay.title: Affiliate Portal: Best Day
bestDay.greeting: Hello Best Day team! Here are your customized sales resources for the 2026 season.
bestDay.resourcesSubtitle: Promotional and technical material customized for Best Day brand standards.
bestDay.contactSubtitle: Need custom materials, group rates, or immediate assistance?
bestDay.formSuccess: Request sent successfully! We will get in touch with you soon.
bestDay.policyInfo: Best Day reservations must be made at least 12 hours in advance. Free cancellations up to 24 hours prior to the tour. Confidential net rates apply according to the current agreement.

hotelBeds.title: Affiliate Portal: Hotel Beds
hotelBeds.greeting: Hello Hotel Beds team! Access XML integration guides, dynamic rate mapping, and technical support material.
hotelBeds.resourcesSubtitle: API documentation, product ID mappings, and graphic materials for global distribution.
hotelBeds.contactSubtitle: Need support with product mapping, API errors, or dynamic agreements?
hotelBeds.formSuccess: Query sent successfully! The technical support team will contact you.
hotelBeds.policyInfo: All API integrations must comply with real-time confirmation protocols. Cancellations are governed by the dynamic agreements set within the API. In case of discrepancy, contact your account manager.

jopaNauticos.title: Affiliate Portal: Jopa Nauticos
jopaNauticos.greeting: Hello Jopa Nauticos team! Access private charter fact sheets, special snorkeling rates, and ocean promotional materials.
jopaNauticos.resourcesSubtitle: Snorkeling tour sheets, private yacht brochures, and high-resolution photo galleries.
jopaNauticos.contactSubtitle: Need a quote for a private group, weather verification, or coordination of a special tour?
jopaNauticos.formSuccess: Message sent successfully! We will get in touch immediately.
jopaNauticos.policyInfo: All water activities are subject to the weather conditions of Puerto Morelos port. If the port is closed by the Port Captaincy, tours will be rescheduled at no cost or refunded at 100%.

tropicalIncentives.title: DMC Portal: Tropical Incentives
tropicalIncentives.greeting: Hello Tropical Incentives team! Access technical sheets for groups, team building catalogs, and incentive resources.
tropicalIncentives.resourcesSubtitle: Group fact sheets, private transportation logistics, and co-branded presentations.
tropicalIncentives.contactSubtitle: Planning a corporate event or a group of over 20 passengers? Request a custom quote.
tropicalIncentives.formSuccess: Request received! Our groups department will reply in less than 24 hours.
tropicalIncentives.policyInfo: Groups require a 30% deposit to guarantee transport and guide blocks. Group cancellations allowed up to 15 days prior without penalty. Rates are dynamic based on the number of participants.

wildPass.title: Affiliate Portal: Wild Pass
wildPass.greeting: Hello Wild Pass team! Access co-branded adventure flyers, promoter rates, and interactive marketing materials.
wildPass.resourcesSubtitle: Youth adventure flyers, downloadable posters for sales points, and short video clips.
wildPass.contactSubtitle: Need materials for your hostel, to organize a brand activation, or physical promo items?
wildPass.formSuccess: Request sent! We will get in touch with you shortly to coordinate.
wildPass.policyInfo: Wild Pass commissions are calculated monthly and settled within the first 5 business days. It is mandatory to register the code WP-WILD-2026 on each reservation to guarantee commission attribution.
